description: An environmental engineer manages the mine's dewatering system to prevent flooding in the pit while ensuring discharged water meets quality standards.

nodes.task_description: Check the water level in the main pit sump.

expected_outcome.expected: The system shows the water level is rising after a heavy rainfall event.

nodes.task_description: Start an additional dewatering pump to increase the pumping rate from the pit to the water treatment plant.

expected_outcome.expected: An extra pump is turned on to handle the increased inflow.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the water treatment plant is operating correctly and the final discharged water is compliant.

expected_outcome.expected: The system confirms the treatment plant is handling the extra flow and water quality remains within limits.
